text: There is a fascinating contrast. The first space feels quiet and monastic, the soft shapes on the floor inviting reflection amidst sterile, geometric surroundings. The second space bursts with color and text, drawing me into a space of inquiry and innovation. Here, curiosity is encouraged; I am both an observer and a participant, contemplating my relationship with technology and knowledge. I feel stimulated, slightly detached, yet eager to make sense of the world this R+D environment promises.
